transcript.text:
(What's with her lovely eyes..?)
(My gosh, is it a flower..?)
(The flower-like dish of the day..!) The presentation is just on point
It's really pleasing to the eyes
(But its taste is nothing like flowers)
(You still think she's got a trick...?) There must be a trick!
(She'll prove herself today) I'll show you how it's done
(Now this, is just a bite for me...!!!)
(Had to order the stew for more!)
(Let's get going!)
(Today's video will be legit mukbang..) I just realized that I ran out of food
(Among the calm residential area)
Hello everyone
I'm here in Samjeon-dong today
for kimchi-pork belly stir-fry
(A flower-like pork belly..?) And I heard the way they present the food

(Full of expectations!) is really nice, so I had to see it myself
Apparently, this place is well-known among local people
And people will start waiting in line at any moment
So I'll get going now
Right here, pork belly with kimchi and sausage stew
('Jangsu Restaurant' Songpa-gu, Seoul)
Ma'am!
What's the maximum portion of pork belly per table?
3 portions would look great but 4 would make a hearty meal
For those who order 5 servings,
- we split up the portions into 3 and 2 - Oh, really?
Then what about the sausage stew?
- It's 4 portions at max as well - 4 servings?
Then I'll have, 3 double servings of
(+ 6 servings of pork belly) kimchi pork belly!
(+ 3 servings of sausage stew) And 3 servings of sausage stew

(Here comes the side dishes) Thank you
(In her clumsy mode again lol) Yikes! Excuse me
(And there's the stir-fried kimchi pork belly!!) My goodness!
This is just awesome!!
(This just can't get any better...) It's really pleasing to the eyes
(Endless compliments LOL) I've never seen anything like it before
It really looks like a flower
(Flowery plate of pork belly..!) The presentation is on point...
They said they'll make the stew inside
(Let's grill the meat first) So I'll start grilling them while I wait
(Ignition)
This menu just can't go wrong
('Jangsoo Restaurant has 32 years of memory) They said they've been here 32 years
It really has this cozy vibe
(The presentation is eye-catching..) And the presentation is just awesome!
(It's the apple of her eye..)

(Here's the sausage stew!) Awesome!
(See you in a few minutes...!) The stew was nicely presented too
The caldron lid is just
(Aweeeesomeee)
Caldron lid!
(Can't help but dance..) I can't wait
(The heat is on!)
- Oh? You're stirring it now? - Yeah
Don't you need an apron?
(You sure about that..?) I'll be fine, thanks
(Knows herself well) This top is basically my apron
(Please be alarmed if you're hungry now) That looks great
(Here come the seasoned veggies!) I'm not a fan of spicy food, so the chili powder isn't that hot
Okay!
(Knows herself well 2) I don't like spicy stuff either
(They should be mixed together for better flavor!) You really need to blend in the flavors

Of course, that's the basics
(Without salt) And this is seasoned green onions
without salt
It's a bit sweet and sour
(The sour taste is what makes them different!) So some find it displeasing because of the sour taste
(But many regulars find) But this is what the other customers come here for
(this delicious...!) So most of the customers order this one
When can I eat it?
(Hold it, wait!) Not yet, I'll tell you when it's done
Yeah
'Jangsu* Restaurant'.. *Means long life in Korean
(Pun intended? Really?) Maybe that's why they've been here a long time...
(Let's forget about that awkward pun with this..!)
(Here's the footage that'll work up your stomach)
And I've been wondering
there must be a trick to your mukbang..!

(It's her stomach, nothing else..lol) I keep thinking 'How does she digest all of the food?'
Something like that
(Coming soon) I'll show you how it's done
(You just wait, stir-fried kimchi pork belly...)
(The grease comes to the middle) There will be a small pool of grease here
You can fry the garlic
(It's a must for fried rice as well!) We'll remove them when you get fried rice, so don't worry about it for now
(The stew's boiling too!!) And there's the stew! That's just awesome
(This just can't get any better...!!)
(Her salivary gland must be working hard today..)
(The stew is served) Thank you
(All the menus are served!) It looks so good
Bon Appetit!
I'm so excited
Let's get kimchi inside the sesame leaf
(How...is it..?!)

Wowsers...this is just great!
This just can't go wrong
It's not that salty
It's got a clean taste
But it sure is savory
It's not zesty, but it sure is tasty!
There's the pool of grease!
(Throwing in some garlic..!) Let's get that in...
The meat is so tender
And it makes a perfect combo with the sesame leaf
(Best restaurants always serve tasty kimchi!) This kimchi really adds flavor and savoriness to the meat
(Lettuce! Lettuce!)
Let's get some lettuce
with a bit of bean paste
Awesome! This is just too great!
The next one is pickled radish!

(Can't say no to tasty stuff!) Awesome
(Getting warmed up for real..) This is great
I should really try the stew
(Let's calm down a bit..lol) But I just can't stop eating the pork belly now
I'll get a sip of the broth first!
This one really is a legit
You know the ones with rich sausage flavor
(That's what it tastes like) It's really full of sausage flavor
(Whoever made this isn't stingy with ingredients) It's got many meat and hams
(In one bite..??)
(That's just on another level..)
Ma'am, can I get a bowl of rice?
(Here it comes!) Thank you
Let's scoop up some rice
(Heaps of pork belly..!) This looks really great!
There we go

(Are you in a hurry or something..?)
(Unable to calm down..) I'm just gulping down everything....
(Where did my food go?) See? I'm almost done now
I mean, it sure is a hearty meal
(But I never slowed down...)
(Let's scrape them up)
The seasoning is just great
A bit of garlic
(You are now watching Tzuyang in her eating mode..)
Let's save the garlic from here
(And get another round!)
(The owner is back on the scene!) Awesome
(Gotta replay what's pleasing to the eyes..) There we go
- Did you eat all the veggies inside? - Yeah!
It was so good and I rarely eat veggies
- Would you like this heated up again? - Can I do that?

- Of course! - Thank you
When I first came up with this menu,
people said it taste just like stir-fried tripe
How old is this menu then?
We used to serve only the stews before
But we ate this dish as a staff meal
with fermented kimchi and one of the customers
asked that they'd like some...that's how this became a menu
(Ready for the 2nd round!) Thank you
- Watch it, it's really hot - Thank you
- The meat is done - Okay
(Don't forget about the garlic!) The fried garlic is something else, really
And it's not just a plain oil, more like red pepper oil
The stew has beans, rice cakes,
and a lot more, like mushrooms as well
(Come here you little fellas...)

Even though I've done this mukbang for 4 years
I still get amazed whenever I make discoveries like this
(Heart filled with joy) And I keep thinking "What food will there be?"
(Ep. Soybean paste stew jokbal) Just like how we discovered this one and Soybean paste stew jokbal
(Wishing for a bottle of soju..) This would make a great munchie for drinks
It's great eating with rice
But I bet it'll go great with soju
(It'll call for more drinks) End of story
(You really look like you're in a hurry now...)
(No one can stop her from eating..)
(Can't forget about garlic) This garlic is just on point!
(Straight into the veggie wrap!) Garlic
The very reason I can keep eating
is because this is packed with flavors...
(Packed with various flavors!) It's sour, savory, and oily
(Look at you go..)

It literally just disappeared
(To you, of course..)
(Have you seen my food..?)
What's this? An ASMR?
Should I talk more..?
I didn't even realize that I wasn't talking
(Heck with the talking, she needs her desserts now..) After eating this, ice cream for dessert
(Heck with the talking, she needs her desserts now..) will be just perfect
Did you talk about the flavors?
(Not sure) I'm sure I did
I said...
(The best compliment) It's great
(Did I do mukbang today..?) I think I lost track of myself
This sure was out of this world..
(Your pace just won't slow down..!)
(Empty)

(Let's finish the stew)
- How much did you eat today? - Today? It wasn't much
(Sausage stew / Stir-fry / Stir-fry) I had 3 servings of each
(9 servings...that's just modest..lol) That's little for you, right?
(I just wanted to see a nice presentation) You said 3 servings would look the best
How do you eat all of it?
(The secret is my stomach) It's not a trick
(Had to fast forward to see her talking...lol)
(She's saying that this stir-fry is great)
Why am I cooling off lettuce?
I really must've lost my mind right now
The stew is really thick and savory!
(All cleared 9 servings of food!)
(Looks like it's safe to say the food is "deleted"...)
(Satisfied) That was nice
Thanks for the food today!
